title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 108.
content:
There was an Old Person of Ewell,
    Who chiefly subsisted on gruel;
    But to make it more nice,
    He inserted some mice,
    Which refreshed that Old Person of Ewell.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 108."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
